title: Projects
filterResult: Filter result: {{count}} items (matching title, description, path and tags)
archivedHint: Archived pipelines can still be opened and edited; files are located in the _archived subdirectory of each pipelines directory.
activeHint: Manage your distributed node architectures and monitoring pipelines. Drag flow.yaml or .zip into this page to import shared flows.
noActive: No active pipelines; archived items are in the Archived tab.
emptyHint: Run {{code1}} in the repository root and ensure the workspace contains {{code2}} or pipelines in the user directory; or click New Pipeline to create one.
noMatch: No pipelines found matching "{{query}}". Try different keywords or clear the search.
noMatchRecent: No recent activity matching the keyword
defaultCardDesc: Open to edit this pipeline in the node canvas.

hubCard.title: Browse community flows
hubCard.desc: Discover and install ready-made pipelines shared by the community.
hubCard.cliHint: Or install via CLI: agentflow download <slug>

newPipelineModal.title: Create New Pipeline
newPipelineModal.lead: Enter a pipeline name (English identifier); description is optional and will be saved in flow's ui.description.
newPipelineModal.nameHint: Must start with a letter, only letters, numbers, underscores _ and hyphens - allowed
newPipelineModal.descPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose of this pipeline...

importModal.title: Import Pipeline
importModal.lead: File "{{filename}}" selected. Please confirm the pipeline name and save location; ZIP will preserve scripts and other files in the directory.
importModal.nameHint: Must start with a letter, only letters, numbers, underscores _ and hyphens - allowed

deleteModal.title: Delete Pipeline
deleteModal.lead: This will permanently delete the pipeline directory from disk (including flow.yaml, scripts, etc.) and cannot be undone. Please enter the pipeline ID "{{flowId}}" below to confirm.
deleteModal.deleteTimeout: Delete request timed out, please retry (check UI service logs in terminal)

archiveModal.title: Archive Pipeline
archiveModal.lead: After archiving, the pipeline will be moved to the "Archived" list and can still be opened and edited from there. Please enter the pipeline ID "{{flowId}}" below to confirm.
